taxExempt.description:
Whether the customer is exempt from paying taxes

Example `"exempt"`

invoices.description: Array of invoices associated with a customer

stripeAccountReady.description:
Whether the customer's Stripe account has complete payment information This property is only set if the customer's payment channel is Stripe

Example `true`

discount.description: The specific customer level discount. This is the discount that is applied to the customer's overall bill.

children.description: The children of a customer group

parent.description: The parent of a customer group

offering.description: The offering associated with a customer

customerId.description:
Unique identifier assigned by Paigo

Example: `"e345f409-daca-4144-91d2-0a0f87c96581"`

customerName.description: The friendly, human-readable name of the customer

paymentChannel.description: The payment channel associated with a customer

paymentChannelOptions.description:
Configuration options for the payment channel. For Stripe payment, `stripeCustomerId` is required. See example below.

Example `{"stripeCustomerId": "acct-xxxxxxxxxxxxxx"}`

customerVatId.description:
The VAT ID of the customer. Every VAT identification number must begin with the code of the country concerned and followed by a block of digits or characters.

Example `"GB VAT 123456789"`

offeringId.description: DEPRECATED The unique identifier of the offering associated with a customer. Contains the most recent offering the customer is enrolled in. To be removed at a later release date. Please use the enrollments array instead.

creditBalance.description:
The amount of credit in the customers' account

Example `"100"`

freeTrialEndDate.description:
DEPRECATED The end date of the free trial for the offering. This is calculated from the current date and the free trial length. To be removed at a later release date. Please find the free trial end date on the enrollment object instead.

Example `"2020-12-31T23:59:59.999Z"`

offeringEnrollmentDate.description:
DEPRECATED The date time when a customer enrolled for an offering. Please find this on the enrollment object instead

Example `"2020-12-30T23:59:59.999Z"`

freeTrialStartDate.description:
DEPRECATED The start date of the free trial for the offering. This is determined when the customer is enrolled in the offering. To be removed at a later release date. Please find the free trial start date on the enrollment object instead.

Example `"2020-12-28T23:59:59.999Z"`

currency.description:
The currency of the customer

Example `"USD"`
